checks: Cross-view status consistency (dashboard vs list vs detail vs settings)

findings.description: Status inconsistency across views — NOT FIXED. test-cluster-minikube shows: Dashboard='Degraded', Clusters List='Warning', Cluster Detail='Healthy', Settings='active'. Four different status representations.
findings.evidence: Dashboard snapshot: 'Health: degraded | test-cluster-minikube | Degraded'. Clusters list screenshot: Warning badge. Cluster detail screenshot: green dot + 'Healthy' badge. Settings table: 'active'.

findings.description: Dashboard LIVE counter still shows '0 live · 2 registered' — NOT FIXED. Even though test-cluster-minikube detail shows Healthy/1 node/active, the dashboard LIVE counter remains 0.
findings.evidence: Dashboard snapshot text: '0 live · 2 registered'. Cluster selector shows '🟢 test-cluster-minikube' (green dot) but LIVE count is still 0.

findings.description: SSE MIME type error — FIXED. Browser console shows no SSE or presence-related errors. Connection status shows 'Connected' and 'Synced just now'.
findings.evidence: Browser console returned empty messages array on multiple page loads across dashboard, clusters, and detail views.

findings.description: Login produces no JWT via /api/auth/login (404). Auth appears cookie/session based — not blocking as UI login works.
findings.evidence: curl POST /api/auth/login returned 404. Browser login works fine.
